novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Was not killed by Guan Xing. His death is mentioned in Sanguozhi, but with no details, though he was still alive after Liu Bei’s defeat at Yiling.

full_text:
Pan Zhang (Wengui) 潘璋 (文珪)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pan Zhang (潘璋), styledWengui (文珪), was born in Fa Gan County, Dong Commandery (Presently Pu Yang in He Nan Province). Served Wu. Led the forces which captured Guan Yu and his son, Guan Ping. Pan Zhang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Pan Zhang lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
